productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Charcoal T-shirt
description: Composition Charcoal grey round neck T-shirt made of 52% polyester and 48% cotton, has a ribbed neckline, short sleeves and rubber print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron on reverse; do not iron on decorations For cool urban wear this printed mark taylor T-shirt is perfect for any season. This off-duty essential will soon become your favourite while the cotton/polyester blended fabric will keep you fresh all day - pair it with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
